high_descs: Cross the room and face the dresser in the corner with the lamp.
Pick the disc up from in front of the lamp on the dresser.
Move to the left and face the lamp on the dresser.
Turn the lamp on the dresser on.
anns.task_desc: Pick up a disc and turn the lamp on.
anns.task_dec: Pick up a disc and turn the lamp on.
robot_human_memory1-1: Human: Hey there! I need your assistance with a couple of things around the house. First, can you check if the desk lamp is functioning properly? I want to ensure we have enough light for our next task.
Human: Thanks! After that, I’d like to find a disc that I can use for entertainment. It should be one of the CDs stored on the shelf, so please look for it and let me know which one you find.
Human: Perfect! Once you find the disc, I’d like you to set up the television so that we can enjoy whatever we choose to watch. Let’s make sure everything is ready for a relaxing evening.
Human: Great! And remember, I want the lamp to be bright enough to create a cozy atmosphere while we enjoy our time together. I think the disc will pair nicely with the right lighting.
anns.task_desc1-1: Human: Alright, let’s wrap this up. Please pick up a disc and turn the lamp on. That should set the mood for our evening!

high_descs: Turn right and walk to the bed, then turn left and walk to the window, then turn right to face the dresser.
Pick up the cd from the left side of the dresser.
Turn left and look at the window then turn right and face the dresser.
Turn on the lamp on the corner of the dresser.
anns.task_desc: Look at a cd under the light of a lamp.

high_descs: turn left and walk towards the bed turn left and walk towards the door turn right and turn towards the dresser then turn left towards the door turn right and walk forward towards the dresser
pick up the cd on the left
turn to your left then back to the dresser
anns.task_desc: pick up the cd and turn on the lamp on the dresser
